name: Sim Boss Golf & Racing Simulation Lounge
about: Sim Boss Golf & Racing Simulation Lounge is an indoor venue offering golf and racing simulations in a comfortable lounge setting. The facility provides year-round access to golf simulators, racing simulators, and a bar with video games and board games, allowing patrons to play, relax, and socialize. Sim Boss operates on a pay-for-play basis with pricing for individual or group sessions and offers monthly memberships for unlimited access to racing simulators.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf simulation regardless of weather conditions
Comfortable lounge setting with cozy seats for an enjoyable experience
Convenient central location for golf, racing, and social activities in one venue

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with beer, wine, and soda available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Golf clubs are available for rent, though you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Food and drink are available for purchase on-site. There is no mention of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation session is typically one hour in duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sim Boss is a family-friendly venue and hosts events like parent's night outs, making it suitable for children.
